habitat: Mediterranean and SW Europe; naturalized elsewhere.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional support for digestive complaints related to the liver; modern standardized extracts studied.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell bei verdauungsbedingten Beschwerden mit Bezug zur Leber; standardisierte Extrakte erforscht.
preparation: Seed powder, capsules of standardized extract; tea less common for silymarin yield.
cautions: Asteraceae allergy. Not a substitute for medical care in liver disease—seek professional advice.
historicalNotes: Medieval Christian legend of Mary’s milk on the leaves; pharmacognosy staple.
habitatDe: Mittelmeergebiet und SW Europa; eingebürgert elsewhere.
preparationDe: Seed powder, Kapseln von standardized Extrakt; Tee less common für silymarin yield.
cautionsDe: Asteraceae Allergie. Kein Ersatz für medizinische Versorgung in liver disease—seek fachlicher Rat.
historicalNotesDe: Medieval Christian legend von Mary’s milk on die Blätter; pharmacognosy staple.
